tagline: Your Backyard Oasis - You Dream It, We Make It Happen

hero.headline:
Award-Winning Pools Built for Your
Family
hero.subheadline: From custom gunite pools to weekly maintenance, EverClear has served Northern New Jersey families for 16 years. You dream it, we build it — then keep it crystal clear so you can just enjoy it.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: From Dream Design to<br class="hidden md:block"> Crystal Clear Water
services.subtitle: Whether you need a stunning custom pool built from scratch or reliable weekly maintenance to keep it pristine, EverClear handles every phase of pool ownership.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pools
cards.description: Fully customizable concrete pool construction with expert design and industry-leading techniques. Your dream pool, built to last generations.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your outdated pool into a modern backyard oasis. New plaster, tile, coping, decking, and features that make it feel brand new.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Standalone spas or integrated pool-and-spa combos designed for the ultimate relaxation experience right in your backyard.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive valet service keeps your pool crystal clear all season. Chemical balancing, cleaning, and equipment checks — every single week.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Service
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — our CPO-certified technicians diagnose and fix it fast. Most repairs completed same visit.

cards.title: Vinyl Pool Construction
cards.description: Beautiful vinyl liner pools offering a cost-effective path to your backyard paradise. Wide variety of patterns and designs to choose from.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream backyard. We'll visit your property for a free consultation and create a custom design tailored to your space, style, and budget.

steps.title: We Bring It to Life
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles every detail — from permits and excavation to finishing touches. You'll get regular updates and clear communication throughout the entire build.

steps.title: Dive In & Relax
steps.description: Your backyard oasis is ready. And with our weekly maintenance plans, it stays crystal clear season after season. We build the pool and the relationship.

about.label: Why NJ Families Choose EverClear
about.headline: 16 Years of Building Backyard Memories Across Northern New Jersey
about.description: Led by owner Jason Werner, EverClear Pools & Spas has grown from a passion for craftsmanship into one of Northern New Jersey's most decorated pool contractors. With NESPA Outstanding Achievement Awards from 2017 through 2024 and nearly 500 five-star reviews, we build relationships that last as long as the pools we create. From Passaic County to the surrounding communities, families trust us because we treat every project like it's our own backyard.

features.title: Certified & Award-Winning
features.description: CPO certified, OSHA safety trained, BBB A+ rated, and recognized with NESPA awards every year since 2017. Excellence is not optional.

features.title: Full-Service, Start to Finish
features.description: We design, build, maintain, and repair. One trusted team from your first consultation through years of weekly service. No subcontractors, no runaround.

features.title: Community Committed
features.description: Proud to support our neighbors through the Harold & Frances Werner Food Drive. We build pools and stronger communities. Se Habla Espanol.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, honest quote. Financing options available to fit your budget — ask us about flexible payment plans.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, we come back and make it right at no extra charge. For construction projects, we stand behind our work with industry-leading warranties. EverClear means never worrying about your pool again.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pool builds take 8-12 weeks depending on the design complexity and permitting. We keep you informed every step of the way with regular updates and clear timelines. Vinyl pools can often be completed faster.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to make your dream pool a reality. During your free consultation, we'll discuss budget-friendly payment plans that work for your family. Ask us about current promotions.

faqs.question: What areas in New Jersey do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Passaic County and surrounding areas throughout Northern New Jersey, including Paterson, Wyckoff, Franklin Lakes, Saddle River, Clifton, Alpine, Mendham, and more. We also serve parts of Orange County, New York.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool openings and closings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer seasonal pool opening and closing services to properly prepare your pool for summer and protect it through winter. Many of our maintenance clients bundle these services for added savings.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Every EverClear technician is CPO certified, OSHA safety trained, and carries full insurance. Our team holds certifications from the Pool & Hot Tub Alliance and NESPA. Your family's safety is our top priority.

testimonials.name: Terry G.
testimonials.text: Thomas and Justin came today to clean up after the pool's opening. They were fabulous. Started work right away, were pleasant and professional and my pool is absolutely clean. Great work!

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: The team keeps our pool crystal clear all season with quick and friendly communication. Eric and Charles who perform weekly maintenance are amazing, very friendly, helpful, and professional.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Jason and Michael are incredibly dedicated to clear communication and timely updates throughout the construction process. The professionalism and responsiveness of the EverClear team is outstanding.
